scripts.desktop:dist: npm run backend:build-sidecar && npm run ui:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run backend:build-sidecar && npm run ui:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run backend:build-sidecar && npm run ui:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run backend:build-sidecar && npm run ui:build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux
